title: Cars24 South Asia Partners is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Cars24 South Asia Partners is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Cars24 South Asia Partners, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Full Stack Developer for our Agra operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Cars24 South Asia Partners:
Cars24 South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Docker

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Life and accident insurance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Learning & development budget
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Agra, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Cars24 South Asia Partners!
